module_info.docstring:
Automatic context window compression for long conversations.

Self-contained class with its own OpenAI client for summarization.
Uses Gemini Flash (cheap/fast) to summarize middle turns while
protecting head and tail context.

classes.name: ContextCompressor
classes.docstring:
Compresses conversation context when approaching the model's context limit.

Algorithm: protect first N + last N turns, summarize everything in between.
Token tracking uses actual counts from API responses for accuracy.

methods.name: update_from_response
methods.docstring: Update tracked token usage from API response.

methods.name: should_compress
methods.docstring: Check if context exceeds the compression threshold.

methods.name: should_compress_preflight
methods.docstring: Quick pre-flight check using rough estimate (before API call).

methods.name: get_status
methods.docstring: Get current compression status for display/logging.

methods.name: _generate_summary
methods.docstring: Generate a concise summary of conversation turns using a fast model.

methods.name: compress
methods.docstring:
Compress conversation messages by summarizing middle turns.

Keeps first N + last N turns, summarizes everything in between.
